Request a demo

Mixed-Use Developments

One perimeter. Multiple zones. One platform.

Mixed-use developments blend residential, commercial, and retail in a single security perimeter — but each zone has different access rules, different visitor profiles, and different risk patterns. SYAG handles all of it from a single admin dashboard.

Key use cases

Zone-Based Access Control

Define separate security zones within your development — residential towers, office floors, retail areas, underground parking. Assign different access rules and guard responsibilities per zone.

Multi-Tenant Visitor Management

Office tenants pre-register their own visitors. Residents pre-register personal visitors. Retail staff manage deliveries. SYAG handles all visitor types with zone-appropriate QR passes and access windows.

Cross-Zone Incident Management

An incident that starts in the retail area may involve a visitor who has access to the residential car park. SYAG links incidents across zones and gives the security operations team a complete picture regardless of where the incident started.

Unified Guard Management

Guards assigned to different zones are all visible in the same live map. Supervisors can dispatch across zones and maintain facility-wide patrol coverage from a single screen.

See SYAG for your mixed-use development.

Request a demo →
